script:
set +e
echo '=== aixa user exists? ==='
id aixa 2>&1
getent passwd aixa 2>&1
echo '=== chown aixa test (verbose) ==='
chown -Rv aixa:aixa /home/aixa/.claude 2>&1 | head -8
stat -c '%U:%G %n' /home/aixa/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== /home/azureuser permissions ==='
stat -c '%a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser /home/azureuser/.npm-global /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude 2>&1
echo '=== test claude readable by aixa ==='
sudo -u aixa test -r /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude && echo readable || echo NOT-readable
sudo -u aixa test -x /home/azureuser/.npm-global/bin/claude && echo executable || echo NOT-executable
echo '=== aixa journalctl (last 30 lines) ==='
journalctl -u aixa-responder.service --since '60 min ago' --no-pager 2>&1 | tail -30
echo '===END==='
